watchlist.question: Bitcoin Up or Down - February 28, 12:40PM-12:45PM ET
watchlist.description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the Bitcoin price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the BTC/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/btc-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream BTC/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

watchlist.question: Portland State Vikings vs. Montana Grizzlies
watchlist.description:
In the upcoming CBB game, scheduled for February 28 at 4:00 PM ET:

If the Portland State Vikings win, the market will resolve to "Portland State Vikings".

If the Montana Grizzlies win, the market will resolve to "Montana Grizzlies".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.

If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.
watchlist.reason: 0天后到期 | 低风险
watchlist.action: 观察 - 等待比赛结果
watchlist.entry_plan: 比赛开始前1小时检查赔率变化，流动性充足时可赛前对冲
key_risks: 比赛推迟/取消
球员伤病突发
裁判判罚争议
加时赛/点球决胜
watchlist.thesis: 体育类市场结算清晰，0天后到期。需关注比赛实际结果和潜在中断。

watchlist.question: Spread: West Ham United FC (-1.5)
watchlist.description:
In the upcoming Premier League game, scheduled for March 4 at 2:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "West Ham United FC" if West Ham United FC win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Fulham FC".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on premierleague.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

watchlist.question: Will Kristoffer Reitan finish in the Top 5 at the 2026 Cognizant Classic in The Palm Beaches?
watchlist.description: This market will resolve to "Yes" if the listed player finishes in the top 5 at the 2026 Cognizant Classic in The Palm Beaches tournament, including ties. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No". If final results are not announced by March 8, 2026 at 12:00AM ET this market will resolve to "No". The primary resolution source will be the official results published by the PGA Tour website (https://www.pgatour.com/).

watchlist.question: US forces in Venezuela again by March 31, 2026?
watchlist.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if active US military personnel physically enter Venezuela at any point between market creation and the specified date, 11:59 PM ET.

Military special operation forces will qualify; however, intelligence operatives will not count. 

US military personnel must physically enter the terrestrial territory of Venezuela to qualify. Entering Venezuela's maritime or aerial territory will not count.

Military contractors, military advisors, or high-ranking US service members entering Venezuela for diplomatic purposes (and their accompanying entourage) will not qualify.

The resolution source will be a consensus of credible reporting.
watchlist.reason: -28天后到期 | 低风险
watchlist.action: 观察 - 需进一步研究

watchlist.question: KHL: Admiral Vladivostok vs. Salavat Yulaev Ufa
watchlist.description:
In the upcoming KHL game, scheduled for 2026-03-01:
If Admiral Vladivostok win, the market will resolve to "Admiral Vladivostok".
If Salavat Yulaev Ufa win, the market will resolve to "Salavat Yulaev Ufa".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods and shootouts. In the event of a shootout, one goal will be added to the winning team's score for the purpose of resolution.
watchlist.reason: 1天后到期 | 低风险

watchlist.question: Spread: FC København (-2.5)
watchlist.description:
In the upcoming Denmark Superliga game, scheduled for March 1 at 11:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "FC København" if FC København win the game by 3 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Randers FC".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on superliga.dk. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.
